name: Recruiter + Email Outreach
description: Find candidates for any role via Apollo and Hunter, show a ranked shortlist with draft emails for approval, then send personalized outreach via StableEmail. Logs sent history to prevent duplicate outreach. ~$1.70 USDC per run.

data.label: Recruiter + Email Outreach
data.name: Recruiter + Email Outreach
data.description: Find candidates for any job role using Apollo + LinkedIn data, show you a ranked shortlist with draft outreach emails for your approval, then send personalized cold emails via StableEmail. Saves a sent log to data/sent_log.md to prevent duplicate outreach across runs. Payments in USDC via agentcash (x402/MPP on Base).
data.useCases: Find and email PM candidates; source engineers and send cold outreach; recruit and contact sales reps; build a shortlist and reach out — any role, any seniority.
data.notFor: Not for passive research only (use recruit-skill instead). Not for mass cold email campaigns. Not for non-recruiting outreach.

data.label: Role Requirements
data.description: Job title (e.g. 'Product Manager', 'Senior Engineer'), required skills, location (optional — leave blank for global/remote), min years of experience (default 3+), company stage (startup / enterprise / any), your name, your company, and the reply-to email address for candidate responses.
data.placeholder: Product Manager, B2B SaaS, San Francisco, 5+ years, startup stage. I'm Alex at Acme Corp. Reply-to: alex@acmecorp.com

data.label: Apollo People Search
data.description: Search for ~20 candidates matching the role brief. Use q_keywords for role + skills (do NOT combine with person_titles — returns 0 results). Returns obfuscated names — must enrich each result immediately using the returned id. $0.02 per call.

inputSchema.q_keywords: string — role title + key skills. Never combine with person_titles.

data.label: Apollo People Enrich (parallel × 20)
data.description: Resolve obfuscated search results into full profiles with verified email. Pass the id from people-search. Run in parallel — one call per candidate. Returns full name, email, email_status, title, company, LinkedIn URL. Only trust email when email_status === 'verified'. $0.0495 per call × 20 = ~$0.99.

inputSchema.id: string — Apollo person ID from people-search result

data.label: Hunter Email Verifier
data.description: Verify email deliverability before outreach. Keep only result === 'deliverable'. Drop 'undeliverable' or disposable emails. Mark 'risky' + accept_all as 'catch-all — test before bulk send'. Also check data/sent_log.md and skip any email already logged. $0.03 per call × ~15 = ~$0.45.

inputSchema.email: string — candidate email from Apollo enrich

data.label: Rank Candidates 0-10
data.instruction:
Score each verified candidate 0-10 against the role brief:
- Current title matches role exactly → weight 3
- Years of relevant experience ≥ min → weight 2
- Location match (if specified) → weight 2
- Required skills evident in profile → weight 2
- Company stage match → weight 1

Sort descending. Keep top 10. Break ties by most recent role start date. Skip any candidate whose email already appears in data/sent_log.md.

data.label: Confirmation Gate (REQUIRED — never skip)
data.instruction:
Show the user:
1. A ranked table of top 10 candidates with name, current role, company, email, and score
2. A draft outreach email for each candidate — personalized 3-sentence format:
   Subject: Excited about you for our {{JOB_TITLE}} role
   'Hi {{FIRST_NAME}}, I came across your profile and was impressed by your work as {{CURRENT_TITLE}} at {{CURRENT_COMPANY}} — exactly the kind of background we're looking for. We're hiring a {{JOB_TITLE}} at {{HIRING_COMPANY}} and I think you'd be a great fit. Would you be open to a quick 20-minute call this week? Best, {{RECRUITER_NAME}}'

Wait for explicit user approval before sending anything. Options: approve all, approve specific candidates, edit an email, or cancel.

data.label: StableEmail Send (per approved candidate)
data.description: Send personalized outreach email for each approved candidate. Always set replyTo to the recruiter's email. Send HTML + text together for best deliverability. Sends from relay@stableemail.dev. Log every successful send to data/sent_log.md immediately. $0.02 per email × ~10 = ~$0.20.

data.label: Candidate Report + Sent Log
data.description: Markdown report: table of all candidates contacted (name, current role, company, email, sent?), list of skipped candidates with reasons, cost summary table (Apollo search + enrich + Hunter verify + StableEmail send + total USDC). Also append each successful send to data/sent_log.md: | email | name | role | date | run-id |
